_comment: Glossary terms that must be preserved as-is across ALL languages. Brand names, product names, third-party services. Used by review-locales-with-gemini.mjs as system context.
_tierComment: Tier names. By default Plus/Standard/Yearly stay as English/Latin (brand-feel). Enterprise + Trial we DO translate where it makes sense (the user clicks the badge to see local-language tier name). Override per locale here if needed.

_specialCases.comment: Special hints for known Google Translate failure modes
_specialCases.trial_meaning: The word 'Trial' in subscription context means 'free trial period' / 'trial subscription', NOT 'court trial' / 'lawsuit'. Common bad Google translations to fix: tr=Duruşma, de=Versuch, es=Ensayo, ko=재판, ar=محاكمة, he=משפט — should become subscription/试用/probación equivalents.
_specialCases.enterprise_meaning: The word 'Enterprise' is a subscription tier name (B2B/business tier). Should translate as 'business/corporate plan' in local language. Most current Google translations are reasonable (de=Unternehmen, es=Empresa, ja=企業, ko=기업) — keep those.
_specialCases.min_unit: Short 'min' as time unit for minutes is rendered via Intl.NumberFormat in the UI — not via these translations. But texts like 'X min · €Y' should keep 'min' or local equivalent (RU=мин, JA=分, KO=분, ZH=分钟).
_specialCases.lead_score: 'Lead Score' (sales funnel term). Can stay English in most languages or translate to local 'sales rating' equivalent.
_specialCases.ui_button_length: Button labels should stay SHORT (under ~20 chars). Modal titles can be longer. Marketing copy (BillingPage tier descriptions) can be 1-2 sentences.
